source_pr.title: br/lightning: fix test lightning_duplicate_detection
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: close #29178

Problem Summary:

Fix test lightning_duplicate_detection.

### What is changed and how it works?

Fix test lightning_duplicate_detection.

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [x] Integration test

Side effects



Documentation



### Release note

<!-- bugfix or new feature needs a release note -->

```release-note
None
```

root_cause_explanation: The lightning_duplicate_detection integration test depends on a real cluster and parses `run_sql` output to verify detected conflict rows. Output formatting differences (e.g., quoted `row_data`) and session-variable application made the comparison unstable, so the test was temporarily skipped. This PR stabilizes it by normalizing parsed output (strip quotes), ensuring session vars are applied after connecting, and removing the temporary skip to re-enable the test.
fix_pattern: Normalize `row_data` parsing in the test script (strip quotes) and apply session vars after DB connect; remove the temporary `exit 0` skip to re-enable the integration test.

evidence: evidence: -# skip unstable test for temporary
